data.title: Eli Lilly's Stock Rises Over 4% Following U.S. Approval of Weight Loss Drug Foundayo
data.description: Eli Lilly's shares saw a significant increase of over 4% after the company's weight loss drug, Foundayo, received approval in the United States. According to Jin10, this development marks a pivotal moment for Eli Lilly as it expands its portfolio in the lucrative weight loss market. The approval is expected to boost the company's revenue and strengthen its position in the pharmaceutical industry. Investors are optimistic about the potential impact of Foundayo on Eli Lilly's future growth, reflecting positively in the stock market.

data.title: SpaceX is expected to go public in June, with a valuation potentially exceeding $1.75 trillion.
data.description: Sources familiar with the matter revealed that SpaceX has secretly filed for an IPO, bringing it one step closer to becoming the largest IPO in history. The sources said SpaceX has submitted a draft IPO registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and is expected to list in June, becoming the first of three potential mega-IPOs, ahead of OpenAI and Anthropic. The sources indicated that SpaceX may seek a valuation exceeding $1.75 trillion in its IPO. The company previously acquired Musk's artificial intelligence startup xAI, bringing the combined entity's valuation to $1.25 trillion. Details of the listing, including the number of shares to be sold and the price range, are expected to be disclosed in subsequent filings. SpaceX's IPO could raise as much as $75 billion, far exceeding the current record holder Saudi Aramco's $29 billion in 2019. The sources said that banks including Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Morgan Stanley will serve as the lead underwriters for the IPO. (Jinshi)

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Space Stocks Surge with Intuitive Machines Leading Gains
data.description: U.S. space stocks experienced a notable rise, with Intuitive Machines leading the gains by climbing 8.7%. According to Jin10, Rocket Lab followed with a 4.8% increase, while Planet Labs saw an 8.4% uptick. Howmet Aerospace also contributed to the upward trend, rising by 3.1%. This surge reflects growing investor interest in the aerospace sector, driven by advancements and strategic developments within these companies.

data.title: Far East Consortium Sells Stake in Melbourne Ritz-Carlton for Capital Optimization
data.description:
Far East Consortium International Limited has announced the sale of a 49.9% stake in the company owning the Ritz-Carlton Hotel in Melbourne, Australia, for nearly HKD 315 million. According to Ming Pao, the stake, along with associated debts, was sold to a Singapore-based holding company owned by the group's chairman, David Chiu, and his daughter, executive director Winnie Chiu.

The group stated that this transaction will help realize the value of the hotel, allowing the proceeds to be utilized for capital reinvestment. Additionally, it aims to increase liquidity and reduce the group's net asset-liability ratio.

data.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Reportedly Files for Secret IPO
data.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX has reportedly filed a confidential application for an initial public offering (IPO), according to market news. According to NS3.AI, the information was initially cited by Jin10. Details about the IPO, including the timeline and valuation, remain undisclosed. SpaceX, known for its ambitious space exploration and satellite projects, has been a significant player in the aerospace industry. The potential IPO could mark a pivotal moment for the company, attracting substantial investor interest.

data.title: Forecast Market Volume Expected to Reach $75 Billion in Q1 2026
data.description: The forecast market is projected to reach a record trading volume of $75 billion in the first quarter of 2026, according to CryptoRank data. According to ChainCatcher, this marks a significant increase from the $44 billion recorded in the fourth quarter of 2025, representing a growth of approximately 70%. Over the past two years, the forecast market has rapidly expanded, becoming a crucial part of the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: New York gold futures first broke through the $4,800 mark
data.description: According to Gate data, New York gold futures touched $4,800 per ounce, up 2.60% on the day. Spot gold is currently up 2.25% at $4,773 per ounce.

data.title: SpaceX has secretly filed for an IPO.
data.description: According to market sources, Elon Musk's SpaceX has secretly filed for an IPO. (Jinshi)

data.title: China Reports Surge in Cross-Border Renminbi Transactions with ASEAN
data.description: China announced that cross-border renminbi transactions with ASEAN countries reached 8.9 trillion yuan, approximately $1.3 trillion, in 2024. According to NS3.AI, Liu Jun, counsellor at China’s Mission to ASEAN, highlighted that this total represents an increase of over 50% compared to the previous year, underscoring the renminbi's role as a key regional currency.

data.title: JPMorgan Predicts UK Central Bank Rate Hike in June
data.description: JPMorgan has revised its forecast for the UK central bank's interest rate adjustments, now anticipating a 25 basis point increase in June. According to Jin10, this update contrasts with earlier predictions that suggested rate hikes would occur in April and July. The change in forecast reflects evolving economic conditions and monetary policy considerations.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | New York Gold Futures Reach $4,800 per Ounce Amid Daily Rise
data.description: Gold futures in New York have surged to $4,800 per ounce, marking a 2.60% increase within the day. According to Jin10, spot gold has also risen by 2.25%, currently priced at $4,773 per ounce.

data.title: 45,000 ETH were transferred from Bitgo to the Bitmine address.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a whale address previously withdrew 25,000 ETH from the CEX and transferred it to BitGo. Subsequently, 45,000 ETH (US$95.3 million) were transferred from BitGo to the Bitmine address.

data.title: Mexico's Central Bank Survey: Inflation and GDP Growth Forecasts for 2026
data.description: According to Jin10, a survey conducted by Mexico's central bank reveals that private sector analysts anticipate an overall inflation rate of 4.21% by the end of 2026, slightly up from the previous forecast of 4.0%. The GDP growth rate is expected to be 1.49%, a minor decrease from the earlier prediction of 1.50%. The exchange rate is projected to remain stable at 18.10 Mexican pesos per U.S. dollar by the end of 2026, consistent with the previous survey. Additionally, the benchmark interest rate is forecasted to stay unchanged at 6.50% by the end of 2026.

data.title: Paradigm Explores Development of Prediction Market Trading Terminal
data.description:
Paradigm, a major investor in the prediction market Kalshi, is reportedly developing its own trading terminal for prediction markets. According to Odaily, this initiative is being led by Paradigm partner Arjun Balaji and is aimed at professional traders and market makers. An official spokesperson for Paradigm declined to comment on the matter.

Sources indicate that Paradigm is also considering the establishment of an internal market-making department within the prediction market sector. Additionally, the firm is collaborating with researchers to explore the feasibility of creating a prediction market index. This index would bundle multiple prediction markets into a single tradable platform, similar to how the S&P 500 index aggregates the stocks of 500 companies.

data.title: Hyperliquid co-founder: Android beta app released; users should be wary of fake apps.
data.description: Hyperliquid co-founder iliensinc announced on social media that the Hyperliquid mobile app is now available on the Google Play Store. Currently in MVP testing mode, it only offers fill notification functionality. This version represents an initial attempt to transition from a Proof-of-Life (PWA) to a native app, with deliberately streamlined features to gather user feedback and optimize feature priorities and device compatibility. Downloads will be limited during the testing phase. Furthermore, iliensinc cautioned users against downloading counterfeit apps from the Play Store and recommended obtaining installation links through official channels. Subsequent versions will continue to optimize notification configurations and user experience.

data.title: Paradigm is developing a prediction market trading terminal and exploring the creation of prediction market indices.
data.description: Paradigm, a major investor in the prediction market Kalshi, is developing its own prediction market trading platform. Paradigm partner Arjun Balaji is leading the project, which will target professional traders and market makers. A Paradigm spokesperson declined to comment. Furthermore, sources say Paradigm is also considering establishing an internal market-making department within the prediction market space, in addition to developing the trading platform. Paradigm is also collaborating with researchers to explore the feasibility of creating a prediction market index. This would package multiple prediction markets into a single tradable platform, much like the S&P 500 index combines the stocks of 500 companies. (Fortune)

data.title: OpenAI loses favor in the secondary market, investors flock to Anthropic
data.description: OpenAI stock has fallen out of favor in the secondary market, with investors quickly turning to its biggest competitor, Anthropic. Ken Smythe, founder of Next Round Capital, said demand for OpenAI stock on his secondary market platform is declining. In the past few weeks, about six institutional investors with significant stakes, including hedge funds and venture capital firms, contacted his firm seeking to sell approximately $600 million worth of OpenAI stock. Last year, these shares would have been snapped up within days, but now there's no interest. Smythe stated, "Buyers are saying they're ready to invest about $2 billion in Anthropic stock." Record demand for Anthropic is also appearing on other platforms, including Augment and Hiive. Augment co-founder Adam Crawley pointed out that OpenAI is valued at $852 billion, while Anthropic is valued at $380 billion, with investors rushing to buy Anthropic stock in hopes of a valuation increase. (Jinshi)

data.title: Intel to Reacquire Full Ownership of Ireland Facility with $14.2 Billion Deal
data.description: Intel has announced plans to repurchase Apollo Global Management's 49% stake in its Ireland manufacturing facility for $14.2 billion. According to NS3.AI, this transaction will restore Intel's full ownership of Fab 34. The acquisition will be financed through cash reserves and approximately $6.5 billion in new debt. Following the announcement, Intel's shares increased by up to 8.3% in early New York trading.

data.title: Iran Rejects Ceasefire, Aims for War Resolution
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi has announced that Iran is not in favor of a ceasefire and is instead focused on achieving a resolution to the ongoing conflict. According to NS3.AI, Araghchi emphasized Iran's commitment to ending the war through diplomatic means rather than temporary cessation of hostilities. This stance reflects Iran's strategic approach to addressing the underlying issues of the conflict.

data.title: Sources say US Vice President Vance met with a "mediator" regarding the Iran conflict and said Trump has lost patience.
data.description: Sources say that US Vice President Vance recently met with "intermediaries" regarding the Iran conflict on Tuesday. US President Trump instructed Vice President Vance to privately convey that he is willing to accept a ceasefire if certain US demands are met, such as reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Vice President Vance relayed Trump's "stern" message, stating that Trump has lost patience and warning that pressure on Iranian infrastructure will increase unless an agreement is reached. (Jinshi)
